title: Farewell to the Surface
description: On pages 13–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Rayleigh, Luffy, Franky, Brook. The core story beat is farewell to the surface.
scene: The scene centers on farewell to the surface, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Rayleigh, Luffy, Franky, Brook driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! We're going down! Everyone, raise the sails!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Apparently coating ships can use sea currents as a substitute for wind to propel the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's more to it than just sinking to the bottom?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, men!!! I have tons of things that I've been wanting to say to you all this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but for the moment, let's leave it at this!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Thanks for going along with my selfish whim for these past two years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, like this is the first time we've been swept along by his crazy whims...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! This is just what you're always like!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rear Admiral!! The pirate ship is sub- merging!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You fiends! Do you have any idea how dangerous those criminals are?!:)

summary: Farewell to the Surface. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
